summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 open PRs from the shard, all non-security-sensitive, with no shared canonical. Job permissions disable merge, fix PRs, instant close, and low-signal closeout, so every item is kept as an independent PR requiring normal maintainer review or author/proof follow-up rather than dedupe closure.

actions.reason: Independent maintainer-review PR; no closure or merge action allowed in this plan shard.
